name: ThermoMPNN
description: Given a protein structure, predict the stability change upon each point mutation at each position. Uses transfer learning from features in ProteinMPNN for improved performance on Megascale and Fireprot datasets.
capabilities: Given a protein structure, predict the stability change upon each point mutation at each position
Uses transfer learning from features in ProteinMPNN for improved performance on Megascale and Fireprot datasets

pdbFile.description: Input wildtype protein structure in PDB format to score stability changes

multi.description: Include all chains in structural context for multi-chain complexes
